no-restricted-globals.name: navigator
no-restricted-globals.message: Use the Platform API instead of navigator to detect the operating system (e.g. Platform.isMobile, Platform.isDesktop).

no-restricted-globals.name: setTimeout
no-restricted-globals.message: Use window.setTimeout() instead of setTimeout() for popout window compatibility.

no-restricted-globals.name: setInterval
no-restricted-globals.message: Use window.setInterval() instead of setInterval() for popout window compatibility.

no-restricted-properties.message: Use the Platform API instead of navigator to detect the operating system.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Do not create HTML heading elements directly. For a consistent UI use new Setting(containerEl).setName(...).setHeading() instead.
